plugins.name: CC Switch
plugins.description: Quick switch Claude Code API Provider (based on cc-switch CLI)
plugins.description_zh: 快速切换 Claude Code API Provider (基于 cc-switch CLI)
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Whiteboard
plugins.description: Infinite canvas whiteboard with freehand drawing, shapes, text and images
plugins.description_zh: 无限画布白板工具，支持自由绘图、图形、文本和图片
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: JSON Formatter
plugins.description: JSON formatting, minifying and validation tool
plugins.description_zh: JSON 格式化、压缩与验证工具
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Skill Manager
plugins.description_zh: 管理 Claude Code Agent Skills (~/.claude/skills/)
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Text Diff
plugins.description: Text diff comparison tool with line-by-line highlighting
plugins.description_zh: 文本差异对比工具，支持逐行对比与高亮显示
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Claude Code
plugins.description: Visual conversation manager for Claude Code — browse history, create and resume sessions
plugins.description_zh: Claude Code 可视化对话管理 — 浏览历史、新建和恢复会话
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Session Browser
plugins.description: Read-only session browser for Claude Code and Codex — browse, search, archive/restore history sessions (no composer)
plugins.description_zh: Claude Code 与 Codex 的只读会话浏览器 — 浏览、搜索、归档/恢复会话（无输入框）
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Volcano Ark Quota
plugins.description: Display Volcano Engine Ark Flow Plan quota (5h / daily / weekly / monthly) in the status bar
plugins.description_zh: 在状态栏展示火山引擎 Ark Flow Plan 配额（5小时 / 日 / 周 / 月）
plugins.author: dinotty

plugins.name: Jiahao Globe
plugins.description: eDEX-UI style rotating wireframe globe with IP geolocation
plugins.description_zh: eDEX-UI 风格旋转线框地球，支持 IP 地理定位
plugins.author: jiahao

plugins.name: Jiahao Monitor
plugins.description: eDEX-UI style system monitor with CPU, RAM and disk usage charts
plugins.description_zh: eDEX-UI 风格系统监控，CPU、内存、磁盘使用率实时图表
plugins.author: jiahao

plugins.name: Jiahao Time
plugins.description: eDEX-UI style clock with red digits and Chinese date display
plugins.description_zh: eDEX-UI 风格时钟，红色数字显示时间和中文日期
plugins.author: jiahao

plugins.name: Jiahao Keyboard
plugins.description: eDEX-UI style on-screen keyboard with physical key sync and terminal input
plugins.description_zh: eDEX-UI 风格屏幕键盘，支持物理键盘同步和终端输入
plugins.author: jiahao

plugins.name: Cloudflare Tunnel
plugins.description: Create an independently authenticated, temporary Cloudflare Quick Tunnel for Dinotty
plugins.description_zh: 为 Dinotty 创建独立认证的临时 Cloudflare Quick Tunnel
plugins.author: dinotty
